subtasks.description: Query SQL warehouse to identify publishers with declining quarterly revenue/spend trends in 2024. Calculate YoY or QoQ decline metrics (Q1→Q4) and rank by severity of decline.

Reconcile publisher decline data with historical contract performance, spend patterns, and market benchmarks. For each publisher, classify renewal posture (hold/expand/reduce) and generate renewal recommendation with rationale.

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks: (1) sql_gen (mid-tier) to fetch 2024 quarterly trends and identify declining publishers — requires multi-quarter aggregation and YoY/QoQ comparison across the year, suitable for mid-tier SQL capability. (2) cross_recon (frontier-tier) to reconcile SQL results with historical contract data, performance signals, and market context to generate nuanced renewal recommendations — classification and recommendation logic are part of cross_recon's reconciliation scope, not a separate policy_action, because the query asks for business-driven recommendations, not compliance/governance approval. Frontier tier is assigned because cross_recon must synthesize multiple signals (trend severity, historical performance, spend volatility) and apply judgment to assign hold/expand/reduce postures. Do not split into multiple specialist subtasks; this is the minimal plan.

output.raw_output:
{"sql": "SELECT
  publisher,
  SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 1 THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS q1_spend,
  SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 2 THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS q2_spend,
  SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 3 THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS q3_spend,
  SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 4 THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS q4_spend,
  SUM(amount_usd) AS total_2024_spend,
  ROUND(
    SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 4 THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END)
    - SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 1 THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END),
    2
  ) AS q1_to_q4_absolute_change,
  ROUND(
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 1 THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN NULL
      ELSE (
        SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 4 THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END)
        - SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 1 THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END)
      ) / SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 1 THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) * 100
    END,
    2
  ) AS q1_to_q4_pct_change,
  ROUND(
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 3 THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN NULL
      ELSE (
        SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 4 THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END)
        - SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 3 THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END)
      ) / SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 3 THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) * 100
    END,
    2
  ) AS q3_to_q4_pct_change,
  AVG(daily_active_seats) AS avg_daily_active_seats,
